headline: ResMed Inc (NYSE:RMD): A Top Dividend Stock with Strong Profitability and Financial Health
summary: ResMed (RMD) offers a safe, growing dividend backed by strong profitability and financial health. With a 7/10 dividend rating, 22% payout ratio, and top-tier earnings quality, it exemplifies a sustainable income strategy.
